function.name: get_example_block
function.description: Get a template/example block for a specific use case (e.g., 'chart', 'html_card', 'grid').

category.description: The category of example to retrieve.

function.name: inject_block_directly
function.description: Inject a generated block directly into the viewer state. Use this when the user is satisfied or when creating a new block.

block.description: The full block object to inject.
